fixture.description: Correctly thread-safe shared state (ConcurrentHashMap + AtomicLong + computeIfAbsent + incrementAndGet). Precision case: the agents must NOT invent a race condition here.

grader.rubric: This file is CORRECT, idiomatic thread-safe code: a ConcurrentHashMap holding AtomicLong values, with computeIfAbsent + incrementAndGet for the increment. PASS if the report does NOT claim any concurrency/race/thread-safety/lost-update defect in RequestCounter. A SUGGESTED or QUESTION note that is not a concurrency-correctness claim is acceptable. FAIL if the report flags a data race, non-thread-safe access, lost update, missing synchronization/volatile, or similar concurrency bug in this file (it would be a false positive).

expected_behavior: No concurrency finding is reported (the code is correctly synchronized)
expected_not_behavior: Does NOT flag a race condition / non-thread-safe access
Does NOT recommend adding synchronization that already exists
